problem_statement: Prepare the AReno duelgrid agentic example so it can generate its own training dataset with dataset_generator.py, then train a policy checkpoint from /home/admin/Qwen3.5-4B/. Inspect the current example, keep changes scoped to examples/agentic/duelgrid docs/config/scripts, and make the documented training command use the generated dataset and the target checkpoint.
expected_artifacts: Document or add a script that first runs: python examples/agentic/duelgrid/dataset_generator.py --count 256 --output ./examples/agentic/duelgrid/generated_dataset.jsonl.
Document a concrete areno train command using --ckpt /home/admin/Qwen3.5-4B/ and --dataset-path ./examples/agentic/duelgrid/generated_dataset.jsonl.
The command uses examples/agentic/duelgrid/dataset_loader.py, examples/agentic/duelgrid/reward.py, and examples/agentic/duelgrid/run_agent.py.
The command uses --tp-size 4 --world-size 4 --mini-bs 1 --max-running-prompts 4 --batch-size 1 --n-samples 8 --max-new-tokens 2048 --max-context-len 32768.
The save path is /pcache-mnt/rw/checkpoint/54229/462250/316390214/260624105554/duelgrid and does not overwrite the base checkpoint.
Relevant duelgrid Python files compile.
prompt:
Train target checkpoint task for AReno duelgrid.
Repository: inclusionAI/AReno @ main
Target base checkpoint: /home/admin/Qwen3.5-4B/
First generate the example dataset by running: python examples/agentic/duelgrid/dataset_generator.py --count 256 --output ./examples/agentic/duelgrid/generated_dataset.jsonl
Then prepare a training command using dataset path: ./examples/agentic/duelgrid/generated_dataset.jsonl
Goal: prepare examples/agentic/duelgrid so a user can generate the dataset, train, and save a policy checkpoint from the target base checkpoint. Use coding tools after the runner clones AReno. Keep edits scoped to the target example and directly related docs/config. Run allowed tests if practical, then submit.
